title: D.El.Ed Jobs 2026 – Cook, House Keeper and More
shortInfo: District Child Protection Unit, Bhagalpur (DCPU Bhagalpur) Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Various Contractual. Candidates with Diploma/Degree, 8th Pass, 10th, D.El.Ed, Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 16-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DCPU Bhagalpur official website bhagalpur.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Cook, House Keeper and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit, Bhagalpur (DCPU Bhagalpur) Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Various Contractual. Candidates with Diploma/Degree, 8th Pass, 10th, D.El.Ed, Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 16-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DCPU Bhagalpur official website bhagalpur.nic.in.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: EBC and SC candidates as per Bihar government rules; SC up to 42 years.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed., 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music, 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical education, 8th Pass, Matriculation with certificate course in Vocational Trade
qualification.details: Educator (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed. from a recognized University. Art & Craft cum Music Teacher (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music from a recognized University. PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical education. Cook: 8th Pass. Helper cum Night Watchman: 8th Pass. House Keeper (Sweeper): 8th Pass. Care Taker cum Vocational Instructor (For Special Unit) Girls Home-1: Matriculation with a certificate course in Vocational Trade (Tailoring, Handicraft, Mobile Repairing, Basic Computer Skill Like Data Entry Etc).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bhagalpur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCPU Bhagalpur Various Contractual Posts is 16th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 17 vacancies are available for various contractual posts in the District Child Protection Unit, Bhagalpur. These vacancies are distributed across different positions as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the DCPU Bhagalpur posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years as of 01 May 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per Bihar government rules.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Merit List prepared from qualification percentage and higher degree marks, followed by an Interview.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post. They range from 8th Pass to Matriculation with vocational trade certificates, and 10+2 with diplomas or degrees in elementary education, arts, music, yoga, or sports, depending on the specific role.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the contractual posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies for different posts, ranging from Rs. 7944/- per month for Helper cum Night Watchman and House Keeper (Sweeper) to Rs. 10000/- per month for Educator, Art & Craft cum Music Teacher, and PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit, Bhagalpur, which is https://bhagalpur.nic.in. Ensure you download it from the official source.

faq.question: What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates along with the filled application form.
